name: ulw-prompt-builder
description: Turn a vague idea into an optimized copy-paste prompt for lazycodex/OmO $ulw-plan or $ulw-loop. Outputs prompt text only; never runs the target skill.

interface.longDescription: Interactively turns a vague idea into the optimal copy-paste prompt for lazycodex/OmO's $ulw-plan (planning) or $ulw-loop (evidence-gated execution). Recommends the target, asks 3-5 targeted questions, fills the full reward structure (loop: scenario/expectedEvidence + completion promise + adversarial + verification + Must-NOT; plan: intent signal + owner-decision + context), and selectively weaves in relevant OmO $-skills. Outputs prompt text only and never runs the target skill.
defaultPrompt: $ulw-prompt-builder turn this idea into a $ulw-plan prompt
